title: GOP-Backed Justices Prevail in Georgia in Unusually Spirited Supreme Court Elections
summary:
No sitting justice has lost reelection here in over a century, but two liberal attorneys aimed for an upset while stressing the importance of state courts for voting and abortion rights.

title: Atreon Orthopedics: Merger With RenovoDerm To Expand Synthetic Biomaterials Platform
summary:
Atreon Orthopedics announced a merger with RenovoDerm, bringing together two companies focused on synthetic biomaterials for tissue repair and remodeling. The combined organization, Atreon Orthopedics, Inc., aims to expand its Autobiologic™ platform technology across orthopedic, trauma, sports medicine, reconstructive, foot and ankle, and complex wound applications.
The post Atreon Orthopedics: Merger With RenovoDerm To Expand Synthetic Biomaterials Platform appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Anthony, Linder & Cacomanolis: $25 Billion Transactional History Powers Capital Markets And M&A Intelligence Platform Relaunch
summary:
Anthony, Linder & Cacomanolis, PLLC, announced the relaunch and expansion of its digital intelligence platform, designed to provide C-suite executives and international boards with detailed guidance for navigating capital markets transactions and mergers and acquisitions. The firm said the platform incorporates insights derived from more than $25 billion in completed transactions over the past two decades.
The post Anthony, Linder & Cacomanolis: $25 Billion Transactional History Powers Capital Markets And M&A Intelligence Platform Relaunch appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Sands Point Risk: Launch Environmental Underwriters Acquisition Expands Specialty Insurance Platform Beyond $250 Million In GWP
summary:
Sands Point Risk announced the acquisition of Launch Environmental Underwriters, a specialized provider of environmental general liability insurance solutions focused on complex risks across the energy, infrastructure, construction, chemical, M&A, and industrial sectors. The acquisition marks the largest transaction in Sands Point’s history and advances the company’s strategy of building a diversified managing general agent (MGA) platform in high-growth specialty insurance markets.
The post Sands Point Risk: Launch Environmental Underwriters Acquisition Expands Specialty Insurance Platfor

title: Unframe: $50 Million Raised As Enterprise AI Company Surpasses $100 Million TCV
summary:
Unframe announced it has raised an additional $50 million in funding led by Highland Europe, bringing the company’s total funding to $100 million. Existing investors participating in the company include Bessemer Venture Partners, Craft Ventures, TLV Partners, Third Point Ventures, Cerca Partners, and Vintage Investment Partners.

title: NEX Health Intelligence: Imperial College London Startup Raises €1 Million For AI Infection Prediction Platform
summary:
NEX Health Intelligence, a healthcare AI startup created at Imperial College London, has raised €1 million in pre-seed funding to further develop its artificial intelligence platform designed to predict the appearance and spread of infections within hospitals.

title: Mentari Therapeutics: $290 Million Private Placement Supports Merger With InMed Pharmaceuticals To Advance Migraine Prevention Therapies
summary:
Mentari Therapeutics and InMed Pharmaceuticals announced a definitive merger agreement in an all-stock transaction designed to accelerate the development of next-generation migraine prevention therapies. The combined company will operate as Mentari Therapeutics and trade on the Nasdaq Capital Market under a new ticker symbol following the close of the transaction.
The post Mentari Therapeutics: $290 Million Private Placement Supports Merger With InMed Pharmaceuticals To Advance Migraine Prevention Therapies appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Zoovu: AI-Native Ecommerce Product Discovery Engine Expanded Through XGEN AI Acquisition
summary:
Zoovu announced the acquisition of XGEN AI to create a unified AI-native engine for e-commerce product discovery. The combined platform brings together search, recommendations, personalization, guided selling, bundling, and conversational AI into a single system designed for enterprise B2C and B2B ecommerce teams.
The post Zoovu: AI-Native Ecommerce Product Discovery Engine Expanded Through XGEN AI Acquisition appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Auxia: Interview With Co-Founder & CEO Sandeep Menon About The Agentic AI Platform Company
summary:
Auxia is an agentic marketing platform that autonomously determines the best experience for every customer, orchestrating cross-channel, real-time journeys across web, app, email, and SMS while optimizing for business goals like activation, retention, cross-sell, and lifetime value. Pulse 2.0 interviewed Auxia co-founder and CEO Sandeep Menon to learn more.

title: Vital Signals: $15 Million Raised To Transform Blood Pressure Management
summary:
Vital Signals announced it has raised more than $15 million in funding to support its mission of improving how people understand, engage with, and manage blood pressure and long-term heart health. The investment round was led by XYZ Ventures.
The post Vital Signals: $15 Million Raised To Transform Blood Pressure Management appeared first on Pulse 2.0.

title: Armada: $230 Million Series B Raised To Scale Modular AI Infrastructure And U.S. AI Manufacturing
summary:
Armada announced a $230 million oversubscribed Series B round at a $2 billion pre-money valuation to accelerate deployment of modular AI infrastructure and expand domestic manufacturing capacity for sovereign AI systems. The funding round was co-led by BlackRock, Overmatch, and 8090 Industries, and included participation from strategic investors including Johnson Controls, NightDragon, Mitsui, and Singtel Innov8.

title: Bunch: $35 Million Series B Raised By Private Markets Infrastructure Platform In Series B Funding
summary:
Bunch, a private markets infrastructure platform, has raised $35 million in Series B funding led by Portage, part of Sagard, with participation from Illuminate Financial.

title: Relay: $50 Million Financing Raised To Build Small Business Financial Command Center
summary:

title: Hellbender: $12.5 Million Seed Round Raised To Accelerate Domestic Manufacturing Of Physical AI And Launch On-Edge Camera Line
summary:
Hellbender announced the closing of a $12.5 million seed funding round to accelerate domestic manufacturing capabilities and expand its edge AI hardware platform portfolio. The round was co-led by Magarac Venture Partners and Veredas Partners, with participation from Mana Ventures, Gaingels, Sum VC, and Active Angels Network.

title: Mister Car Wash: $3.1 Billion Take-Private Deal Completed With Leonard Green & Partners
summary:
Mister Car Wash announced the completion of its take-private acquisition by investment funds managed by Leonard Green & Partners in an all-cash transaction implying a total enterprise value of approximately $3.1 billion.

title: National Equity Fund: Acquisition Of National Affordable Housing Trust Portfolio Expands Affordable Housing Platform
summary:
National Equity Fund announced the acquisition of the property and fund management portfolio of National Affordable Housing Trust in a strategic transaction designed to preserve affordable housing assets and strengthen long-term support for residents, investors, and developers nationwide.

summary:
